record.field:
KB ELECTRONICS STORE

This Business setup for Electronics store where they can sell their electronics items like Home Appliances, Kitchen Appliances, etc...

Customer is coming directly visiting their store and looking for great offers and discounts in cheapest cost.

They Generally require below apps to manage their business workflow.

KB ELECTRONICS STORESetupBusiness FlowFlow 1. Purchase  Flow 2.  Sale with serial numberFlow 3. Delivery Flow 4: Field Service Installation - ACFlow 5: Website Complaint


Setup

  • Tracking By Lot/serial Number and Warranty Date on Products Warranty Date (Expiry Date Label Changed)
  • Quotation Template
  • Task Create Based on Sales Order
  • Payment Terms - Instalment (EMI)
  • Warranty Tracking On Delivery Date (Automated Action)
  • Installation Report - Worksheet Template (Studio Customisation)
  • Payment Acquirer
  • Website- Shop/Complaint


Business Flow

Flow 1. Purchase  

Let's buy some items that are tracked by serial numbers.

  • Create the Purchase Order
    • Select product LG Dual Inverter Window Air Conditioner
    • Confirm the RFQ
  • Go to the reception
    • Assign serial numbers
    • Validate the reception

Flow 2.  Sale with serial number

When selling electronics, most items are tracked with serial numbers. To deliver the installation service, we use the project management app, with one task per installation to do.

Create a quotation with:

  • product: LG Dual Inverter Window Air Conditioner 
  • product: Air Conditioner Installation
  • payment term: 30 % Advance Rest Instalment
To speed up the creation of the quotation, use the template "..."

Once the order is confirmed:

  • Odoo will generate 1 task for the Air Conditioner Installation.
  • The delivery order will be created for the LG Dual Inverter
    • The salesperson sets the "expected delivery date" based on customer availability
  • The warranty date will be set once the delivery is confirmed (Studio, Automated Action: Update Warranty Date)

Flow 3. Delivery 

Every day, the logistic manager reserve products that should be delivered today (reservation is set to manual for this location, so that he has a control of what he wants to send today). If a delivery order should be delivered today but products are not available, he informs the customer using the chatter on the delivery order.

Then, the worker process all delivery orders that are ready, using the barcode interface. From delivery orders:

  • Click on the first delivery order
  • Scan product LG Dual Inverter Window Air Conditioner
  • Scan the serial number
  • Scan the "validate" barcode


Flow 4: Field Service Installation - AC

In the office, the service manager assign task to installers. To do so

  • Go to project "Air Conditioner Installation"
  • Switch tasks to Gantt view
  • Use the magnifier 🔎 icon to select tasks to assign

Field Service Engineer checking daily activity with Mobile App : 

  • Go to Mobile Odoo App "Air Conditioner Installation"
  • Check with My Task
  • Plan the visit customer location
  • After completion work update the remarks
  • Field service engineer will visit the client place and start working on installation.
  •  Document - Guidelines of Installation
  • Product wise Guidelines and steps given for the Service Engineer

  • Move the task "In Progress" and then "Done" when it's finished and sign the service report.
  • Worksheet will help for the installation Report


Flow 5: Website Complaint


Customer can register their complaint for the existing purchased products with serial numbers from the website. (Follow the Steps) --

  • From the website, click on the menu Helpdesk
  • Fill the form:
    • choose product LG Dual Inverter Window Air Conditioner
    • provide the serial number 804KCPY43321
    • submit ticket.

Support engineer:

  • support ticket will be created from backend.
  • open the ticket from backend , system will be displayed Warranty Date('17/08/2026') of that selected serial number(through Studio).
